'''Lachton''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] in [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization. By [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] he was co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ''[[Wild Karrde]]''. His duties carried him with Talon Karrde to [[Bpfassh]] where he witnessed [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] hit and fade [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] attack against the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Lachton had also been in the [[Draukyze system/Legends|Draukyze system]] some months earlier where he witnessed a similar attack using a single Star Destroyer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
